sentences.sentence: North Americans are not a people of the siesta.
sentences.translation: 北美人并不是喜欢午睡的民族。
difficult_points: a people of the siesta 意为“有午睡习惯的民族”，people 在此作可数名词，指“民族”。
siesta 是西班牙语借词，指午后小睡的习惯，全句用否定句式说明北美人没有这一传统。

sentences.sentence: There is a tendency to associate afternoon naps with laziness and non-productivity.
sentences.translation: 人们往往倾向于把午睡与懒惰、缺乏效率联系在一起。

structure.text: to associate afternoon naps with laziness and non-productivity

difficult_points: There is a tendency to do 表示“存在一种……的倾向”。
associate A with B 表示“把A和B联系起来”。

sentences.sentence: Latin Americans and some in European cultures take a different view.
sentences.translation: 拉丁美洲人以及部分欧洲文化中的人则持不同看法。

structure.text: Latin Americans and some in European cultures

difficult_points: some in European cultures 指“一些欧洲文化中的人”，in European cultures 修饰 some。
a different view 与上一句提到的北美人的态度形成对比，引出下文对午睡益处的介绍。

sentences.sentence: In Mexico and Greece, for example, it is customary in close businesses between noon and about 4:00 pm - siesta time.
sentences.translation: 例如在墨西哥和希腊，中午到下午4点左右——也就是午睡时间——习惯上会关闭商店。

structure.text: In Mexico and Greece, for example
between noon and about 4:00 pm - siesta time

difficult_points: it is customary 中 it 是形式主语，真正的内容由后面的短语体现。
in close businesses 疑为原文错字，语义上应指“关闭商店”这一习俗（close 作动词）。
破折号后的 siesta time 是对前面时间段的补充说明。

sentences.sentence: Recent studies are showing that if you can take a 15 to 30-minute nap while at work in the afternoon, you'll be more alert, more energetic, happier doing what you do, more productive and therefore more likely to get ahead.
sentences.translation: 近期的研究表明，如果你能在下午工作时小睡15到30分钟，你会更清醒、更有精力、做事更开心、效率更高，因而也更有可能获得成功。

structure.text: that if you can take a 15 to 30-minute nap while at work in the afternoon, you'll be more alert, more energetic, happier doing what you do, more productive and therefore more likely to get ahead
if you can take a 15 to 30-minute nap while at work in the afternoon
you'll be more alert, more energetic, happier doing what you do, more productive and therefore more likely to get ahead

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，从句内部又嵌套一个 if 条件从句。
more alert、more energetic 等多个并列表语，具体列举小睡带来的好处。
more likely to get ahead 表示“更有可能取得成功/晋升”。

sentences.sentence: Napping on the job is not yet a trend but there is serious talk in academic circles about the merits of 'power napping'.
sentences.translation: 工作时小睡还没有形成一种潮流，但学术界已经开始认真讨论“高效小睡”的好处。

structure.text: but there is serious talk in academic circles

difficult_points: Napping on the job 是动名词短语作主语。
serious talk about 表示“关于……的认真讨论”。

sentences.sentence: By some estimate, the average American collects an annual 'sleep debt' of 500 hours -subtracting from an assumed norm of eight hours a night.
sentences.translation: 据估计，普通美国人每年会积累500小时的“睡眠债”——这是以每晚睡眠8小时为假定标准计算而少睡的时间。

structure.text: collects an annual 'sleep debt' of 500 hours
subtracting from an assumed norm of eight hours a night

difficult_points: By some estimate 表示“据估计”，引出下文的具体数字。
subtracting from... 是现在分词短语，说明这500小时是相对于每晚8小时标准而言少睡的部分。
短横线紧贴 subtracting，是原文排版留下的间距错误。

expressions.meaning_zh: 睡眠债；睡眠不足的累积

sentences.sentence: Two out of three Americans get less than eight hours of sleep a night during the work week, according to a recent study by the National Sleep Foundation in Washington.
sentences.translation: 根据华盛顿国家睡眠基金会近期的一项研究，三分之二的美国人在工作日每晚的睡眠时间不足8小时。

structure.text: get less than eight hours of sleep a night
according to a recent study by the National Sleep Foundation in Washington

difficult_points: Two out of three 表示“三分之二”，是比例表达。
according to 引出信息来源，说明数据出处。

sentences.sentence: Forty percent say they're so tired that it interferes with their daily activities.
sentences.translation: 百分之四十的人表示自己疲惫到影响了日常活动。

structure.text: that it interferes with their daily activities

difficult_points: so...that... 是结果状语从句，表示“如此疲惫以至于……”。
it 指代前面的“疲惫”这一状态。

sentences.sentence: Sleep researcher William Anthony, a professor of psychology at Boston University, says fatigue is a significant problem in modern society.
sentences.translation: 睡眠研究学者威廉·安东尼——波士顿大学的心理学教授——表示，疲劳是现代社会中的一个重大问题。

structure.text: a professor of psychology at Boston University
fatigue is a significant problem in modern society

difficult_points: a professor of psychology at Boston University 是插入的同位语，说明 William Anthony 的身份。
says 后省略了 that，直接接宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: he says sleepiness is a leading cause of auto accidents, second only to drunkenness.
sentences.translation: 他说，嗜睡是引发车祸的主要原因之一，仅次于酒后驾车。

structure.text: sleepiness is a leading cause of auto accidents

difficult_points: he 首字母小写是原文排印错误，指代上一句的 William Anthony。
second only to 表示“仅次于”，说明嗜睡在车祸原因排名中的位置。

sentences.sentence: All that drowsiness costs an estimated &18 billion annually in lost productivity.
sentences.translation: 所有这些嗜睡状况估计每年造成180亿美元的生产力损失。
difficult_points: &18 billion 中的 & 符号是原文的排印错误，按语境应为货币符号 $（美元）。
in lost productivity 说明这笔损失具体体现在哪个方面。

sentences.sentence: 'We have a simple message,' says Professor Anthony.
sentences.translation: 安东尼教授说：“我们的意思很简单。”
difficult_points: 引语在前，谓语 says 与主语 Professor Anthony 倒装，是引述句常见语序。
a simple message 预示下文即将给出一个简明的观点或建议。

sentences.sentence: 'People should be allowed to nap at their breaks.
sentences.translation: “人们应该被允许在休息时间小睡。
difficult_points: should be allowed to 是被动语态，表示“应该被允许”。
本句是安东尼教授引语的延续，具体说明他所说的“简单信息”的内容。

sentences.sentence: The rationale is a productivity one -workers are sleepy, and when they're sleepy on the job they're not productive.'
sentences.translation: 这背后的道理与生产效率有关——员工犯困，而犯困时工作效率就会降低。”

structure.text: The rationale is a productivity one
and when they're sleepy on the job they're not productive
when they're sleepy on the job

difficult_points: one 替代前面语境中的 rationale，避免重复。
破折号后的内容具体解释这一“生产效率方面的道理”是什么。

sentences.sentence: Some companies are encouraging sleep at work, primarily for safety.
sentences.translation: 一些公司正在鼓励员工在工作中睡觉，主要是出于安全考虑。
difficult_points: primarily for safety 说明鼓励睡觉这一做法的主要目的。
Some companies 承接上文关于小睡益处的讨论，转向具体企业实践的介绍。

sentences.sentence: The Metropolitan Transit Authority, which runs the New York subway system and two suburban railroads, is considering power naps for its train operators and bus drivers.
sentences.translation: 大都会运输署——负责运营纽约地铁系统和两条郊区铁路——正在考虑为其列车司机和公交车司机安排高效小睡。

structure.text: which runs the New York subway system and two suburban railroads
for its train operators and bus drivers

difficult_points: which 引导非限定性定语从句，补充说明 Metropolitan Transit Authority 的职责范围。
power naps 呼应第一段提到的“高效小睡”这一概念。

sentences.sentence: Another railway has started letting its train operators take nap breaks of up to 45 minutes but only when trains are stopped at designated spots off the main lines and dispatchers have been notified.
sentences.translation: 另一家铁路公司已经开始允许其列车司机小睡最多45分钟，但仅限于列车停靠在主线以外的指定地点、且调度员已获知情的情况下。

structure.text: has started letting its train operators take nap breaks of up to 45 minutes
but only when trains are stopped at designated spots off the main lines

difficult_points: let sb do sth 表示“允许某人做某事”，此处用于 letting its train operators take。
but only when... 引导条件状语从句，限定允许小睡的具体条件。

sentences.sentence: Some overseas air carriers permit airline pilots, when not on duty, to nap in the cockpit.
sentences.translation: 一些海外航空公司允许飞行员在非值勤时段于驾驶舱内小睡。
difficult_points: when not on duty 是省略主语和谓语动词的状语从句，补全为 when they are not on duty。
permit sb to do sth 表示“允许某人做某事”，被 when not on duty 插入其中。

sentences.sentence: Airlines in the United States have not accepted this practice yet.
sentences.translation: 美国的各航空公司尚未接受这一做法。

structure.text: have not accepted this practice yet

difficult_points: have not accepted...yet 是现在完成时，强调截至目前仍未接受这一做法。
this practice 指代上一句提到的飞行员在驾驶舱小睡的做法。

sentences.sentence: According to the Encyclopedia of Sleep and Dreaming: 'There is a biologically-based tendency to fall asleep in mid-afternoon just as there is a tendency to fall asleep at night.
sentences.translation: 根据《睡眠与梦境百科全书》：“人在午后犯困是一种基于生物学规律的倾向，就如同夜晚犯困一样。

structure.text: According to the Encyclopedia of Sleep and Dreaming
There is a biologically-based tendency to fall asleep in mid-afternoon
just as there is a tendency to fall asleep at night

difficult_points: just as 引导比较状语从句，将午后犯困与夜晚犯困相类比。
biologically-based 是复合形容词，修饰 tendency，说明这种倾向的生理基础。

sentences.sentence: Moreover, if sleep the night before is reduced or disturbed for any reason, a nap the subsequent afternoon is not only more likely to occur, but it can also relieve sleepiness and increase alertness.'
sentences.translation: 此外，如果前一晚的睡眠因任何原因被减少或打乱，那么次日下午小睡不仅更容易发生，还能缓解困意、提高警觉性。”

structure.text: if sleep the night before is reduced or disturbed for any reason
a nap the subsequent afternoon is not only more likely to occur
but it can also relieve sleepiness and increase alertness

difficult_points: not only...but also... 连接两个并列的谓语，说明次日午睡的两个特点。
it 指代前面的 a nap the subsequent afternoon。

sentences.sentence: The nap zone, documented in numerous studies, is typically between noon and 3:00 pm.
sentences.translation: 众多研究都记录过的“午睡时段”，通常在中午到下午3点之间。

structure.text: is typically between noon and 3:00 pm

difficult_points: documented in numerous studies 是过去分词短语，插入在主语和谓语之间，修饰 the nap zone。
numerous studies 呼应上文提到的《睡眠与梦境百科全书》等研究依据。

sentences.sentence: Some people power through this natural slowdown with caffeine or sugar but if employers allowed naps, the benefits would be improvements in mood and performance, especially in mid-afternoon.
sentences.translation: 一些人靠咖啡因或糖分硬撑过这种自然的疲乏期，但如果雇主允许员工小睡，带来的好处将是情绪和工作表现的改善，尤其是在午后时段。

structure.text: Some people power through this natural slowdown with caffeine or sugar
the benefits would be improvements in mood and performance

difficult_points: power through 表示“硬撑过、强行克服”。
if employers allowed naps, the benefits would be... 是虚拟语气，表示与现实相反的假设情况。

sentences.sentence: Workers would concentrate better and persevere in tasks longer.
sentences.translation: 员工将能更专注地工作，在任务上坚持更长时间。
difficult_points: would 与上一句的虚拟语气呼应，延续同一假设下的结果。
persevere in 表示“在……方面坚持不懈”。

sentences.sentence: Workers commonly sneak naps even without permission but some companies have begun encouraging naps as part of their policies on boosting production.
sentences.translation: 员工常常在没有获得许可的情况下偷偷小睡，但一些公司已经开始把鼓励小睡纳入提高生产力的政策之中。

structure.text: Workers commonly sneak naps even without permission
but some companies have begun encouraging naps
as part of their policies on boosting production

difficult_points: sneak naps 意为“偷偷小睡”，sneak 在此作及物动词。
as part of 引出鼓励小睡这一做法在公司政策中所处的位置。

sentences.sentence: One US distributor, is opening a 2,000-square-foot nap facility that provides beds for up to 20 of its 225 workers at a time.
sentences.translation: 美国一家分销公司正在建造一个2000平方英尺的小睡设施，可同时为其225名员工中的20人提供床位。

structure.text: that provides beds for up to 20 of its 225 workers at a time

difficult_points: distributor 和 is 之间的逗号为原文排印错误，正常不应有逗号分隔主谓。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 nap facility，说明该设施的具体功能。
at a time 表示“每次、一次性”，说明同时能容纳的人数。

sentences.sentence: A company in Japan sets up tents in business offices provides eyeshades and ear plugs and encourages employees to snooze in the middle of the work day.
sentences.translation: 日本一家公司在办公室里搭起帐篷，提供眼罩和耳塞，并鼓励员工在工作日中途小憩。

structure.text: sets up tents in business offices
to snooze in the middle of the work day

difficult_points: offices 与 provides 之间原文缺少逗号，三个并列谓语 sets up、provides、encourages 应各自独立。
encourage sb to do sth 表示“鼓励某人做某事”。

sentences.sentence: According to Professor Anthony, 'You're not going to see napping at traditional types of operations ... but in 21st century-style operations, this isn't going to be a perk.
sentences.translation: 安东尼教授说：“在传统类型的企业中，你不会看到小睡这种做法……但在21世纪风格的企业里，这将不再只是一种额外福利。

structure.text: You're not going to see napping at traditional types of operations
but in 21st century-style operations, this isn't going to be a perk

difficult_points: 省略号处省去了原话中间的部分内容。
this 指代前文提到的“在企业中小睡”这一现象。
perk 指“额外福利、津贴”，与后一句的 productivity 形成对比。

sentences.sentence: It's going to have more to do with productivity.
sentences.translation: 这将更多地与生产效率有关。

structure.text: 's going to have more to do with productivity

difficult_points: have more to do with 表示“与……关系更大”。
It 指代上一句提到的“允许员工小睡”这一做法。

sentences.sentence: Smart employers are understanding that their employees need rest to do their best.'
sentences.translation: 聪明的雇主正逐渐意识到，员工需要休息才能发挥出最佳状态。”
difficult_points: are understanding 用现在进行时，强调这一认识正在逐渐形成的过程。
to do their best 是不定式作目的状语，说明员工需要休息的目的。

expressions.meaning_zh: 尽最大努力；发挥最佳水平

sentences.sentence: Some suspect that corporate naptime, like other perks, is just a way to keep people at the office longer.
sentences.translation: 有人怀疑，企业提供的小睡时间和其他福利一样，只是让员工在办公室待得更久的一种手段。

structure.text: that corporate naptime, like other perks, is just a way to keep people at the office longer
to keep people at the office longer

difficult_points: like other perks 是插入语，将小睡时间与其他公司福利相类比。
a way to do sth 表示“做某事的一种手段/方式”。

sentences.sentence: On the other hand, growing flexibility in hours, for some workers, is allowing nap times to become more common.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，对一些员工而言，工作时间日益灵活，使得小睡变得更加普遍。

structure.text: is allowing nap times to become more common

difficult_points: for some workers 是插入语，限定这种灵活性所适用的对象。
allow sth to do 表示“使某事能够……”。

sentences.sentence: With eleven million Americans telecommuting and another forty million winking out of their bonus full- or part-time, office hours are basically as long as you can stay awake.
sentences.translation: 有1100万美国人远程办公，另外还有4000万人以全职或兼职的方式在家中工作，工作时间基本上取决于你能保持清醒多久。

structure.text: and another forty million winking out of their bonus full- or part-time
as long as you can stay awake

difficult_points: With + 名词 + 现在分词 是独立主格结构，说明伴随的背景情况。
winking out of their bonus full- or part-time 是原文的错字，根据语境应指人们在家中以全职或兼职方式工作。
as long as you can stay awake 字面意为“只要你能保持清醒”，此处引申为“工作时间几乎没有上限”。

sentences.sentence: One thing is sure: longer commutes, more intense, stressful workday and higher production demands are taking a toll.
sentences.translation: 有一点是可以肯定的：更长的通勤时间、更紧张、压力更大的工作日以及更高的生产要求，正在造成负面影响。

structure.text: longer commutes, more intense, stressful workday and higher production demands

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容具体说明“可以肯定的一件事”是什么。
take a toll 表示“造成损害/带来负面影响”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 造成损害；带来负面影响

sentences.sentence: So, with Americans sleeping, less and working, longer hours, some employers are warming up to the idea that a little nap in the middle of the day can be good for business.
sentences.translation: 因此，随着美国人睡得更少、工作时间更长，一些雇主开始逐渐认同这样一种观点：工作日中的小憩片刻有益于企业经营。

structure.text: with Americans sleeping, less and working, longer hours
some employers are warming up to the idea
that a little nap in the middle of the day can be good for business

difficult_points: sleeping, less and working, longer hours 中的逗号为原文排印错误，正常应写作 sleeping less and working longer hours。
with + 名词 + 分词 是独立主格结构，说明这一趋势产生的背景。
that 引导同位语从句，具体说明 the idea 的内容。

expressions.text: warm up to the idea that
